Intraday post (11/March)

Weekly post:

Forecasts are coming true | Weekly post (09-13/March)

I spent the past two weeks to explain agin Iran and the oil-related risk for you both on Twitter and here as well. Also dropped a big summary of geopolitical situation for better clarity.

CPI

Good news is still good news, but with less confidence. Services imporived, energy is down. But it will change. CPI has likely found a “support” here. Soft-landing hope is diminishing. But it is already priced-in. The question is, how long can the admin hold the narrative? As always, my call is April-May, late spring correction.This one wasn’t big, it is just the geo risk. After March 16-18 we will most likely past the heatest part of Iran, then calm down into summer, and a new more vicious wave into late autumn, fron geo front. Market wise, problems will hit back into Q2, and after market will likely start to form a top .

Let’s see today’s positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Speed profile remains net negative, but more vol is bought to the upside, than sold to the downside. However, small difference. Upside vvol is sold.

Centroid is at 6723.43

Downside pivot is at 6677.70target is 6646.19At the pivot we can expect some stickiness. Market expects any downside move to be slowed down. I would add a margin of error band at 6620/30However, based on local positioning, market expects left-tail to 6550 if this band is broken. And then reversion back upwards toward the target.

Upside pivot is at 6797.22target is 6858.63The pivot is a high probability reversion line back towards the centroid, or to 6700, or even 6660 to pin there. You should watch how the momentum dances around 6770/80 during the AM, if it shows some strenght, the pivot can be broken, and upside target is very sticky.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
